name: Gunship Strike Helicopter Game
description: Gunship Strike Helicopter Battle Fighter Game is an intense action-packed air combat experience designed for players who love military shooting games and realistic war simulations. Step into the role of an elite gunship pilot and take control of powerful modern combat helicopters as you dominate the skies in high-risk battlefield missions. From the moment you lift off, you are thrown into immersive warfare scenarios where precision, strategy, and quick decision-making determine victory. Every mission challenges your flying skills and combat instincts as you engage in thrilling air-to-ground attacks against heavily armed enemy forces.
instructions: W Arrow Up rarr Move Front S Arrow Down rarr Move Back A Arrow Left rarr Move Left D Arrow Right rarr Move Right - To click any button use mouse
